overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 following a group of characters walking through a vibrant futuristic city district. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, street-level commercial storefronts, and cyberpunk architecture under bright sunlight with sharp shadows.

events.description: group crosses street intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: following a group of pedestrians along the sidewalk in third-person perspective, approaching an intersection

child with red mohawk walking alongside the group

entered.detail: twin futuristic skyscrapers with '07' signage dominating the skyline
low-rise buildings with various shops and neon signage
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street
traffic lights at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of towering futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. The camera follows a group walking along a commercial sidewalk with storefronts on the left and a street railing on the right. The group crosses an intersection as traffic signals change, with sparse vehicle traffic passing by.

events.description: passing by 24/7 convenience store with purple neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past retail stores and advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman with blue hair taking photographs of the street with a camera
futuristic black sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: convenience store with purple neon '24/7 STORE' sign
yellow digital kiosk displaying animated advertisements
large screen displaying colorful animated advertisements
massive decorative metal arch structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The group walks past a 24/7 convenience store with bright neon signage. A woman with blue hair takes photos of the street while futuristic vehicles drive by. The large metal arch structure becomes visible in the distance as the tall skyscrapers fade from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with vendor displays and trash receptacles

events.description: group stops at magazine rack to observe street traffic
blue-haired woman takes photos of the passing vehicles and street scene

agents.ego_description: pausing at a street corner near a magazine rack to observe surroundings and watch traffic pass by

notable_agents.action: woman in white hat and black jacket standing by the railing looking at traffic
vendor tending to wire magazine rack on the sidewalk

blue public trash barrel next to the railing
green camping tent set up on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The group stops at a street corner next to a magazine rack and trash can. They pause to observe the sparse traffic and street activity. A camping tent is visible on the right sidewalk, and the large metal arch structure appears closer in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit plaza with metro entrance and decorative arch

events.description: group resumes walking toward the large metal arch structure
approaching metro station entrance with teal facade and glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking toward the transit plaza and metro station entrance under the large arch

notable_agents.action: food vendor pushing yellow cart along the sidewalk
man carrying brown duffel bag walking ahead toward the station

entered.detail: teal-colored transit station entrance with glass doors and metal framework
yellow food cart with white umbrella canopy

segments.scene_description: The group resumes walking toward a large transit plaza dominated by a massive decorative metal arch. They pass food vendors and camping tents on the right side. The camera approaches a teal metro station entrance as the digital billboards shift to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling commercial district that transitions from a vista of towering skyscrapers to a wide transit plaza. It begins by following a group along a sidewalk lined with storefronts, crossing a city intersection as sparse traffic flows past. As the group continues, the distant skyscrapers fade from view and are replaced by the bright neon signage of a convenience store and the emerging silhouette of a massive metal arch. The scene then pauses briefly at a street corner beside a magazine rack and a sidewalk tent before the group resumes their walk toward the architectural landmark. Finally, the camera passes food vendors and camping tents, approaching a teal metro station entrance as digital billboards shift across the frame.
